creator: Mel@squeeze.rachie.is-a-geek.net
text:
When altq is enabled on an ath interface, apbridge function stops working. There
was exactly 1 post from september last year about this issue, that had the
answer for me.

Fix: 

None known.
How-To-Repeat: Enable pf with an altq on an ath0 interface. Try pinging one client from another
client.
